mapper.sql: kadd.id, kadd.assessment_dimension_id, kadd.department_tree_id, kadd.attribute1, kadd.attribute2, kadd.attribute3, kadd.attribute4, kadd.attribute5, kadd.create_time, kadd.create_by, kadd.update_time, kadd.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.assessment_dimension_id as ${tAlias}_assessment_dimension_id, ${tAlias}.department_tree_id as ${tAlias}_department_tree_id, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_assessment_dimension_dept (assessment_dimension_id, department_tree_id, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{assessmentDimensionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{departmentTreeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update kpi_assessment_dimension_dept set assessment_dimension_id = #{assessmentDimensionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, department_tree_id = #{departmentTreeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select kad.id,kad.assessment_dimension from kpi_department_tree kdt join kpi_assessment_dimension_dept kadd on kdt.id=kadd.department_tree_id join kpi_assessment_dimension kad on kad.id=kadd.assessment_dimension_id where kdt.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select kad.id from kpi_department_tree kdt right join kpi_assessment_dimension_dept kadd on kdt.id=kadd.department_tree_id left join kpi_assessment_dimension kad on kad.id=kadd.assessment_dimension_id where kdt.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
